# QA Plan: Sprint 3

**Date**: 2026-04-14
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 4 Must Have stories across 2 systems (Archer Character, Boss Phase System)
**Engine**: Unity 6000.3.11f1 (Unity 6.3 LTS)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-03.md`
**Smoke Check**: `production/qa/smoke-2026-04-14.md` (verdict: PASS)

This plan is retrospective — all 4 Must Have stories are already Complete. It formalizes test scope for `/team-qa sprint` so the QA cycle has a clear target list, consistent with Sprint 1 and Sprint 2 convention.

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test (exists) | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| N1-006 Archer Exclusive Skills | Logic | `ArcherExclusiveSkillsTest.cs` (35+ + 2 UnityTests) | Playtest: kiting feel, Quickdraw+CounterRoll combo, Afterimage aggro behavior |
| E3-004 Ground Slam | Logic | `GroundSlamAbilityTest.cs` (19 tests) | Playtest: radial damage hit, telegraph readability, VFX self-termination |
| E3-005 Charge | Logic | `ChargeAbilityTest.cs` (28 tests) | Playtest: direction lock, wall stop, sideways dodge escape, NavMeshAgent restore, impact VFX |
| E3-010 Boss Kill Tracking Fix | Logic | `BossKillTrackingTest.cs` (11 tests) | Playtest: run-completion flow after boss kill vs. player death vs. no-boss room |

---

## Automated Tests — Coverage Already in Place

### N1-006 Archer Exclusive Skills — Logic
**Test file**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Character/Archer/ArcherExclusiveSkillsTest.cs`
**What is tested**:
- PiercingArrow damage falloff: `damage = baseDamage * (0.8 ^ pierceIndex)` — Target 1 = 1.0x, Target 2 = 0.8x, Target 3 = 0.64x
- Multishot per-arrow damage = 0.5x base
- PoisonArrow applies `PoisonState` on hit with 4s duration (stacking deferred to follow-up story 010-poison-state-stack-extension)
- CounterRoll 2x damage buff expires after 3s; second trigger refreshes window without stacking
- Quickdraw `cooldownTime = baseCooldownTime * 0.5f` during 2s buff window
- EagleEye +0.30 crit chance applies only when `distanceToTarget > attackRange * 0.5`
- All 7 skills have correct `compatibleUpgradeTypes` references (arrow upgrades → ArrowShotSkill; dodge upgrades → DodgeRollSkill)

**Edge cases covered**:
- Piercing + Multishot independent pierce tracking per arrow (up to 9 hits per shot)
- Quickdraw + CounterRoll simultaneous activation (intentional burst window)
- Buff expiration on exact-second boundary
- PoisonArrow no-target scenario

**Test count**: 35+ unit tests + 2 `[UnityTest]` play-mode cases

### E3-004 Ground Slam — Logic
**Test file**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Combat/GroundSlamAbilityTest.cs`
**What is tested**:
- MonoBehaviour inheritance contract
- All 7 `[SerializeField]` fields present with correct types (telegraphDuration, damageRadius, damageMultiplier, telegraphVFX, impactVFX, damageLayerMask, state machine reference)
- Default values match GDD tuning knobs (0.8s telegraph, 5f radius, 1.5x multiplier)
- `IsRunning` / `IsDone` initial state and Reset behavior
- Public API surface (`Execute`, `Reset`, virtual `GetTargetsInRadius`)
- `BTAction_GroundSlam` extends BTNode with `Tick(Blackboard) -> BTStatus` contract

**Test count**: 19 structural + default-value tests

### E3-005 Charge — Logic
**Test file**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Combat/ChargeAbilityTest.cs`
**What is tested**:
- MonoBehaviour inheritance contract
- All 8 `[SerializeField]` fields (telegraphDuration, chargeDistance, chargeSpeed, damageMultiplier, 2 LayerMasks, 2 VFX)
- Default values match GDD tuning knobs (0.5s telegraph, 8f distance, 20f speed, 2x multiplier)
- Protected `_chargeDirection` field for direction-lock across coroutine lifetime
- Cached `_telegraphWait` initialized in Awake (avoids per-Execute allocation)
- `SetTarget(Transform)` public injection method (F-007 compliance via Blackboard injection)
- `GetChargeDirection()` falls back to `transform.forward` when no target set
- `SpawnImpactVFX(Vector3 position, Vector3 surfaceNormal)` virtual signature
- `BTAction_Charge` Tick contract and null-ability safety (returns `BTStatus.Failure`)

**Test count**: 28 structural + default-value + behavioral tests

### E3-010 Boss Kill Tracking Fix — Logic
**Test file**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Combat/BossKillTrackingTest.cs`
**What is tested**:
- `DraftRunController.BossKilled` public read-only bool property
- `OnRunComplete()` is parameterless (signature change tested structurally)
- Private `_bossKilled` field exists with correct type
- `BossController.OnAnyBossSpawned` is public static `Action<IBossPhaseController>` event
- Fresh controller has `BossKilled = false`
- Boss fires `OnBossDefeated` → `BossKilled` flips true after `OnRunComplete`
- Player dies before boss → `BossKilled` remains false after `OnRunComplete`
- `StartDraftRun()` resets `BossKilled` to false
- Room with no boss → `BossKilled` stays false
- Stale subscriptions from prior runs do not leak into new runs
- Double-subscription to same boss is idempotent (`_subscribedBosses.Contains` guard)
- `OnDisable` unsubscribes from all boss events (prevents leaks into pooled/destroyed controllers)

**Test count**: 11 structural + behavioral tests using MockBoss and reflection on private handler

---

## Manual QA Checklist (Playtest Scope)

Behavioral criteria that require Play mode + real physics / scene / NavMesh. These were explicitly DEFERRED in each story's Completion Notes and must be verified by playtest for `/team-qa` sign-off.

### N1-006 Archer Exclusive Skills
**Verification method**: Playtest session (30 min) with Archer class
**Who must sign off**: qa-lead + game-designer
**Evidence to capture**: Playtest notes at `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-03-archer-skills.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] PiercingArrow visibly passes through up to 3 enemies in a line (no stop on first hit)
- [ ] Multishot fan spread is visually centered on aim direction, 3 arrows clearly distinct
- [ ] PoisonArrow applies a visible Poison status icon and tick damage over 4s
- [ ] Afterimage decoy spawns at roll origin, draws enemy targeting, disappears after 2s or 1 HP of damage
- [ ] CounterRoll triggers on i-frame block (not on arbitrary dodge); 2x damage buff visible on next shot
- [ ] Quickdraw buff is detectable as faster attack cadence for 2s post-roll
- [ ] EagleEye crit boost is verifiable at long range (visible crit indicator), not at short range
- [ ] Archer kiting feel: can sustain a distance-based playstyle without getting caught by melee enemies (GDD-stated fantasy)
- [ ] Quickdraw + CounterRoll stacked burst window feels rewarding and not degenerate

### E3-004 Ground Slam
**Verification method**: Playtest session (15 min) with a test boss prefab using GroundSlamAbility
**Who must sign off**: qa-lead + game-designer
**Evidence to capture**: Playtest notes at `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-03-ground-slam.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Telegraph VFX appears at boss feet, clearly readable for 0.8s before damage lands
- [ ] Players inside damage radius take damage equal to `boss.Attack * 1.5` (approximate, via Health display)
- [ ] Players outside radius take zero damage
- [ ] Impact VFX self-terminates (doesn't stay in scene indefinitely)
- [ ] Boss has no NavMeshAgent conflict during ability (no stuttering)
- [ ] Damage application uses full DamageCalculator pipeline (critical hits, defense, status modifiers all apply normally)

### E3-005 Charge
**Verification method**: Playtest session (20 min) with a test boss prefab using ChargeAbility
**Who must sign off**: qa-lead + game-designer
**Evidence to capture**: Playtest notes at `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-03-charge.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Telegraph line indicator appears oriented along charge direction for 0.5s
- [ ] Direction is **LOCKED** at telegraph start — moving the player during telegraph does not redirect the charge (AC4)
- [ ] Sideways dodge cleanly escapes the charge (AC7)
- [ ] Boss stops at wall (no clipping through geometry) and spawns impact VFX at wall hit point (AC5)
- [ ] Player contact applies damage = `boss.Attack * 2.0` and spawns impact VFX at player position (AC6)
- [ ] NavMeshAgent resumes correctly after dash (no off-mesh stuck state) — boss can path-find to player after charge ends
- [ ] Impact VFX is oriented toward charge direction (directional sparks face the right way)
- [ ] Edge case: boss clipping into a wall before charge → `Physics.CheckSphere` safety aborts dash cleanly
- [ ] No compile warnings in Unity Editor (AC10)

### E3-010 Boss Kill Tracking Fix
**Verification method**: 3 playtest scenarios (10 min total)
**Who must sign off**: qa-lead
**Evidence to capture**: Playtest notes at `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-03-boss-kill-tracking.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] **Scenario A (boss kill)**: Enter a room with a boss, kill the boss, complete the room. Run summary / RunHistory correctly reflects "boss killed = true".
- [ ] **Scenario B (player death pre-boss)**: Enter a room with a boss, die before killing the boss. Run summary reflects "boss killed = false".
- [ ] **Scenario C (no-boss room)**: Clear a room that has no boss at all. Run summary reflects "boss killed = false".
- [ ] **Regression**: Kill boss → new run → boss not killed → run summary correctly shows new run's state (no leaked flag from prior run).
- [ ] Scene-placed bosses (placed in scene at load time) are detected correctly — `DraftRunController.OnEnable` scan picks them up, not just dynamically-spawned ones.

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Already executed and passed — see `production/qa/smoke-2026-04-14.md`. For reference, critical paths covered:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game / session starts successfully
3. Main menu responds to all inputs (keyboard + mouse, touch)
4. Archer exclusive skills appear in draft pool + apply correctly (N1-006)
5. Ground Slam ability works on a boss prefab (E3-004)
6. Charge ability works on a boss prefab (E3-005)
7. Boss kill tracking fires correctly (E3-010)

**Batch 3 (regression + save/load + performance)** was deferred during smoke check and should be covered during `/team-qa` playtest.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| N1-006 | Does the Archer kiting fantasy hold up with 7 exclusive skills? Is the Quickdraw + CounterRoll burst window rewarding without being degenerate? | 1 (30 min) | Experienced (knows Mage gameplay for comparison) |
| E3-004 | Is the Ground Slam telegraph readable? Does a mid-skill player have enough time to dodge? | 1 (15 min) | New player (readability test) |
| E3-005 | Does the direction lock feel fair? Is sideways dodge the obvious escape? Does the wall stop feel physical, not abrupt? | 1 (20 min) | Both (feel + mechanical) |
| E3-010 | Does the run summary reflect actual boss-kill state across all 3 scenarios? Any UI confusion about "victory vs boss killed"? | 1 (10 min) | Either |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-03-[story-slug].md` and reviewed by qa-lead + game-designer before Sprint 3 can pass `/gate-check`.

**Note**: E3-004 and E3-005 require a test boss prefab with the ability assigned. Boss prefab configuration proper (E3-008) is in Sprint 4 backlog; for this sprint's playtest, use a minimal ad-hoc boss prefab (any EnemyController with `IsBoss = true` + the relevant ability MonoBehaviour attached).

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 3

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [x] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off) — **COMPLETE**: all 4 stories have test files + pass verification
- [x] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic stories — **COMPLETE**: 4/4
- [N/A] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories — no Visual/Feel or UI stories in Sprint 3
- [x] Smoke check passes — **PASS** per `production/qa/smoke-2026-04-14.md`
- [ ] No regressions introduced — **PENDING** `/team-qa` full regression pass
- [x] Code reviewed — **COMPLETE**: `/code-review` ran on every story with APPROVED/APPROVED WITH SUGGESTIONS verdict
- [x] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` — **COMPLETE**: 4/4 via `/story-done`

Outstanding to close the sprint:
- [ ] Regression spot-check across Sprint 1 + Sprint 2 features (Mage class, combos, difficulty, endless mode) — covered by `/team-qa`
- [ ] Playtest sessions per the table above
- [ ] QA sign-off report at `production/qa/qa-signoff-sprint-03-2026-04-14.md` (generated by `/team-qa`)
- [ ] `/gate-check` to advance project stage

---

## Advisories for /team-qa

- **No Sprint 3 playtest records exist yet.** Sessions listed in the playtest table are prerequisites for gate-check sign-off.
- **Behavioral test deferrals are intentional** — each DEFERRED item has a matching playtest checklist item above. QA should close the loop on each deferral.
- **Boss prefab configuration (E3-008) is NOT in Sprint 3 scope** — it is in Sprint 4 backlog. Ad-hoc test prefabs are acceptable for E3-004/E3-005 playtest.
- **Agent-reliability operational note**: during implementation, one sub-agent returned a success report that didn't match actual file state. All fixes were re-applied manually and verified via grep. No code debt from this — documented in memory as a process learning.
